Voter Movie Synopsis: 

Gautam, a working professional in U.S comes to India to  cast his  vote. The young dynamic man falls in love with pretty lady Bhavana. But, winning the heart of the lady love doesn't come easily  for Gautham. She puts a condition and asks him to complete a task . In process of  completing the task Gautam confronts dreaded central minister. The war begins between the politician  and voter. Watch the movie Voter to know  if Gautam wins this political war and at last win his lady love.

From unbiased and comprehensive News to Entertainment programs, International Television Channel Ltd. With the sloganatok moyer Sathe Agamir PotheвАЩ meaning вАШheading towards the future with timeвАЩ, holding Bangla language and culture close to heart, Al-haj Mohammad Mosaddak Ali founded NTV on 3 July 2003. NTV offers diverse mix of programs such as news bulletins, current affairs, talk shows, soap operas, educational, religious, politics related programs, drama, movie, reality shows and other entertainment programs. NTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Digital platform (ntvbd.com) and Mobile. A B O U T N T V 

From unbiased and comprehensive News to Entertainment programs, International Television Channel Ltd. (NTV) has maintained its flagship position across all verticals since its beginning and became one of the most popular TV channels in Bangladesh. With the sloganatok moyer Sathe Agamir PotheвАЩ meaning вАШheading towards the future with timeвАЩ, holding Bangla language and culture close to heart, Al-haj Mohammad Mosaddak Ali founded NTV on 3 July 2003. NTV offers diverse mix of programs such as news bulletins, current affairs, talk shows, soap operas, educational, religious, politics related programs, drama, movie, reality shows and other entertainment programs. NTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Digital platform (ntvbd.com) and Mobile. Apart from Bangladesh, NTV broadcasts its programmes in UK, USA, Canada, some parts of Europe, Middle East, and beyond. Enjoy and stay connected with us!!!

snippet.title: Free Fire Stories | Test Of Faith ft. Galaxy Racer, @vasiyocrj7 | FFWS 2021 Special
snippet.description:
Winning is great, sure, but if you are really going to do something in life, the secret is learning how to lose. Nobody goes undefeated all the time. If you can pick up after a crushing defeat, and go on to win again, you are going to be a champion someday.вАЭ - Wilma Rudolph

Galaxy Racer won't be in FFWS 2021, but they've won our heart with their grit. 

Watch FFWS 2021 finals on 30th May and win exciting rewards at 450k peak viewers:

Choose 1 out of 7
--- Kungfu Emote
--- Let's Go Emote
--- M79- Hipster Bunny (907102107)
--- MP40- Carnival Carnage (907101906)
--- Gloo Wall - Aurous Dragon
--- Gloo Wall - Nuclear Bunker
--- Gloo Wall - Dragon Seal

#FFWS #CommitToThrive #FreeFireEsports #FreeFire #IndiaKaBattleRoyale #Booyah

snippet.title: Lady Gangster (James Bond) New Released Hindi Dubbed Full Movie | Allari Naresh, Sakshi Choudhary
snippet.description:
Nani is a simple man. She is a software professional. He and his family hate getting into problems and lead a very simple life. A twist in the tale arises when he gets married to a lady don Bullet without knowing about her past and criminal activities. Halfway through his marriage, Nani comes to know about his wife's original background and decides to leave her and run away from the city. The rest of the story is as to how Nani manages to deal with these tricky situations and solves all his problems.

snippet.title: Israeli Iron Dome filmed intercepting rockets from Gaza
snippet.description:
Sirens blared in the coastal Israeli city of Ashkelon as the Iron Dome missile defence system intercepted rockets in the sky.

Subscribe to The Telegraph on YouTube вЦЇ https://bit.ly/3idrdLH

Despite having a high rate of success the system doesn't stop every attack and rockets fired from Gaza killed two women in Asheklon.

snippet.title: The Mummy Returns | Ashish Chanchlani
snippet.description:
Open your Free Upstox Gold Account and get Free E-Gold worth Rs. 51 - https://upstox.com/open-gold-account/?utm_source=influencer&utm_medium=organic&utm_term=AshishChanchlaniMay21&f=G5LB

Sooo finally aa gayi hai humari NEW VIDEOO
Pehle toh bhai maaf kar do hum logo ne itna delay kar diya
Sabhi seth logo se maafi
Thoda ghar ki takleef aur team waalo ke family problems ke kaaran hum sab busy ho gaye the
But we are backkkkk 
Presenting to you humara new video вАЬTHE MUMMY RETURNSвАЭ
Ye waali mummy us egypt waali mummy se bhi danger hai lekin apni hai
Dekho ye video humne bahut safely shoot kiya hai aur ghar mein shoot kiya (aur koi option tha kya thanks to wo ghatiya virus)
Mere bhai @Jashan Sirwani  aur  @Tanish Sirwani  ko ghar pe bulaya chatai becha ke sulaya because social distancing zaroori hai aur fir unke saath ye video plan kiya
Is video mein hai padaishi maali @Ritesh Sadhwani aur khandaani daaku dikhne waala @Rohit Sadhwani 
Is video mein apni purani kaam waali bai bhi hai (haan wohi jisne mera valentine kharab kiya) wo  Bhavika Motwani jaise dikhne waali.
Is video mein @Kunal Chhabhria seth bhi hai
Lekin unhone apna part khud shoot kiya kyunki bhai ne khud ko quarrantine kar diya tha 
Lekin dedication dekh rahe ho launde ki? (Ghanta, sab paise ka khel hai babu bhaiya)
Lekin ye video banake bahut maza aaya kyunki maine triple role kiya toh kaafi dino baad swaad aa gaya
Baaki bhaiyo aur unki behno wig mein bahut garmi hoti hai
Mere paseeno ke lie is video ko like kar do seth logрЯЩП
Aur video please end tak dekhna apni mummiyo ke saath 
Aapki puri family ke lie hi toh khaas banayi hai
Mummy se puch ke batana kaunsa scene unko acha laga aur comment karna wo
(Ho sake toh mummy ka reaction record karna)
Baaki meri taraf se saari mummiyo ko, wives,sisters as well as daughters ko bhi
Happy MotherвАЩs dayвЭ§пЄПрЯ•Ї
Sabko puri ACV team ka bahut saara pyaar yaar
Apna sab dhyaan do please aur maa baap ka khaas kar, time kharab chal raha hai, lekin hum sab ek saath isse ladh lengeрЯТ™
Sending loads of love to all ACVIANSвЭ§пЄП
LOVE YOUU 
#AshishChanchlani  #TheMummyReturns #MothersDay

Spiralling violence between Israel and Hamas Islamists is вАЬescalating towards a full-scale warвАЭ, the UN envoy for Middle East Peace warned on May 11, 2021. Tor WenneslandвАЩs statement followed a day that saw the Palestinian militant group fire more than 600 rockets at Israel, which responded with hundreds of air strikes. The violence has left at least 30 Palestinians and three Israelis dead, with many more injured in the two days of fighting following rising tensions in Jerusalem at the start of the Muslim fasting month of Ramadan.

Bongo is  the first and biggest streaming video-on-demand service in Bangladesh. Bongo boasts an ever growing library of over 15.000 full movies, dramas, TV shows, music videos and songs.
